data.title: U.S. Stock Market Shows Mixed Performance
data.description:
According to Odaily, the major U. S. stock indices displayed mixed results. The Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 0. 61%, while the S&P 500 rose by 0. 15%. In contrast, the Nasdaq Composite Index experienced a decline of 0. 29%.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/23936230760506?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Jerome Powell says the Fed won’t make progress on its goals this year if Trump’s tariffs stay
data.description:
Chairman Jerome Powell warned on Wednesday that the Federal Reserve will not be able to meet its targets this year if Donald Trump’s tariffs remain unchanged. Powell said straight up, “we won’t see further progress toward our goals,” if the tariffs stay at current levels. He spoke during a press briefing after the Fed wrapped […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/powell-wont-make-progress-if-tariffs-stay/

data.title: Coinbase Releases Treasure Trove of SEC Docs on Ethereum, XRP and More
data.description:
"We would like to request that the SEC file an amicus in support of the argument that Ether is a security," the NY attorney general's office wrote.
source: https://decrypt.co/318379/coinbase-sec-docs-ethereum-xrp

data.title: Powell: Trump's call for rate cut won't affect Fed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Trump called Federal Reserve Chairman Powell a "major loser" last month for refusing to immediately cut interest rates to cushion the blow of the trade war. At a press conference, when asked about Trump's request, Powell refuted the president, saying that such pressure "really doesn't affect our work or what we're going to do." Powell said the Fed is focused on economic data and its dual mission. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum’s price at risk – Why $1,815 support is key for ETH’s next move

data.title: XRP Price At $9 In September: Gann Angle Resistance Grid Predicts Surge
data.description:
XRP’s price action in the past seven days has been marked by a consistent decline from $2. 25, putting the target at a probable break below $2. If XRP were to lose this support level, there’s a risk of a further crash until it reaches $1. 6, as there isn’t a realistic support base between these levels
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-at-9-in-september/

data.title: Polish crypto firms struggle with uncertainty amid discussions on delayed law
data.description:
Polish crypto companies are grappling with persisting uncertainty about the future of their industry amid continuing debates over a long-awaited bill to regulate the digital assets market in the country. The delayed adoption of the legislation designed to transpose European rules into national law puts Poland in a shrinking group of member states that are […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/polish-firms-struggle-with-delayed-law/

data.title: Analysts: Tight monetary policy will drag down US economic outlook
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SignatureFD analyst Tony Welch said that the decline in U.S. Treasury yields after the Fed meeting may indicate that investors are worried about the impact of tight monetary policy on the economy. The economy is currently slowing down, and implementing tighter monetary policy for a longer period of time will definitely be a disadvantage. Trump's tariffs are affecting the Fed's thinking because the FOMC statement mentioned trade "at the beginning." Powell will use the word "uncertainty" many times in the press conference. (Jinshi)

data.title: Powell Warns of Tariff Impact on Inflation and Employment
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell has expressed concerns over the significant impact of tariffs, which have been larger than anticipated. He stated that if the announced tariff increases persist, it could lead to higher inflation and lower employment rates. The ability to avoid sustained inflation will depend on the scale, duration, and inflation expectations related to these tariffs.

data.title: Powell talks about the recent rise in inflation expectations: tariffs are the main factor
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said at a press conference that recent inflation expectations indicators have risen, reflected in market and survey-based indicators. Respondents, including consumers, businesses and professional forecasters, pointed out that tariffs are a driving factor. However, after the next year or so, most long-term expectation indicators remain consistent with our 2% inflation target. (Jinshi)

data.title: Powell: It is impossible to immediately determine which is more important, inflation or unemployment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Powell was asked which task needs to be solved first - higher inflation or unemployment. He said that both risks have increased. It is not clear which one will be a bigger concern. He said, "It is too early to draw conclusions now." (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed's Powell: Rate cuts this year would be appropriate in some cases
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said that in some cases it is appropriate to cut interest rates this year, and in some cases it is inappropriate to cut interest rates. I cannot confidently say that I know the appropriate interest rate path. (Jinshi)

data.title: Powell: The economy is in a solid state and inflation has dropped significantly
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said that the economy is in a solid state and inflation has dropped significantly. The current inflation rate is slightly above the target level of 2%, and the labor market has reached or is close to the maximum employment level. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Reports Economic Stability and Inflation Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has stated that the economy is in a stable condition, with inflation having significantly decreased. The current inflation rate is slightly above the 2% target level, and the labor market has reached or is near maximum employment.

data.title: Fed Chairman Powell: If the sharp increase in tariffs continues, there will be higher inflation and lower employment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell: Tariffs have been much larger than expected so far. If the sharp increase in tariffs as announced continues, there will be higher inflation and lower employment. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed's Powell: Inflationary effects of policy may be short-lived
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell: Avoiding persistent inflation will depend on the scale, timing and inflation expectations of tariffs, and the inflationary effect of the policy may be short-lived. (Jinshi)

data.title: Former Fed Vice Chairman: Markets have priced in a 40% to 50% chance of a recession
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former Fed Vice Chairman Clarida said that the market has priced in the possibility of a recession between 40% and 50%. (Jinshi)
